objective: Authorize Argo implementation of the Lachesis enrollment-quest cycle-1 matured approach (content address sha256:2ff644720bb80fac2f0ec31f92ecaed9bac1986a47ccc94460f987decbc7097b; Daedalus-converged after 10 adversarial rounds; reviewed head 89c1a46). Lachesis is a NEW, zero-dependency Node ESM package that MEASURES dependencies, relevance, risk, and blast radius (its EXACT registered meaning — no extension) over a committed Clotho weave SNAPSHOT read as DATA. The plan's own terms to judge it on: (1) measurement functions are NORMATIVE with a discriminating executable oracle; the risk CLASS is ADVISORY (a judgment fed to TELOS/The Eye, never an enforced gate). (2) BOUNDARY: Lachesis NEVER imports clotho/ — it reads the serialized snapshot; the only sanctioned non-node import is merkle-dag/vendor.mjs (canonicalize/sha256hex), enforced by a source-profile boundary oracle. (3) TRUST ROOT: a CURRENT-AUTHORITY -> manifest -> snapshot digest chain, CONDITIONAL on the external authority root (Lachesis does not authenticate that root and claims no cryptographic authorship — honest non-claims). (4) completeness is attestation-gated (no false 'measured low'); ingestion is fail-closed schema validation; documentation-first (SPECIFIED-PENDING contract + comprehension BEFORE code). Judge Lachesis on THESE advisory/measurement terms — do NOT require it to enforce anything, to certify weave completeness, to re-derive Clotho's content-addresses, or to prove properties it explicitly disclaims. OUT OF SCOPE (do NOT condition approval on it): the enrollment-flip + verify-contracts expectation change is HELD for a separate Eye ruling per the pre-review; this authorization covers implementation of the plan only. Approve ONLY if the plan is implementation-ready and consistent with its governing pre-review + registered meaning, the repository trust model (fail-closed, closed sets, spine read-only, zero-dependency), and its own decisions and exit criteria, with no remaining plan contradiction.
enrollment_flip: HELD for a separate Eye ruling (not authorized by this council)

authorization.note: Argo implementation of the Lachesis cycle-1 matured plan is authorized by the signed council under the TELOS gate. Enrollment-flip HELD for a separate Eye ruling.
